title: WIP: Add adaptive eval-time context non-record MLX submission
author: stpcoder

data.description: Uses tied input/output embeddings in the SP-1024 model.

novel_contributions: Adaptive eval-time context that performs a coarse validation pass and then rescoring of harder windows with a finer stride
Local Apple Silicon MLX non-record submission documenting a same-setup comparison against standard final evaluation
Demonstrates improved final roundtrip validation bpb versus standard evaluation in the same setup
